# #10469 / #7007 — NER-driven PII pseudonymization at the model boundary

Evidence that the opt-in PII swap layer sends **only realistic surrogates** to a
**live** model provider (never real names/orgs/addresses), reasons coherently on
them, and restores the real values at the execution boundary.

## Artifacts

- `live-cerebras-trajectory.md` — human-readable trajectory (read this first).
- `live-cerebras-trajectory.json` — machine-readable capture: original prompt,
  the exact bytes sent to the provider, the surrogate mapping, the live model
  response, and the restored tool-call args.

Both are generated by the live E2E test
`packages/core/src/runtime/__tests__/pii-swap-live-cerebras.real.test.ts`
against **Cerebras `gpt-oss-120b`** (not a mock). The provider received
`Marco Hoffman at Ridgeline Holdings … 5591 Cypress Court`; the real
`Dana Whitfield / Acme Robotics / 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway` never left the
process, and the `SEND_EMAIL` handler ran with the real recipient.

## Reproduce

```bash
# Requires CEREBRAS_API_KEY. The test is a *.real.test.ts, excluded from PR CI.
cd packages/core
CEREBRAS_API_KEY=sk-... bunx vitest run \
  --config <(printf 'import c from "./vitest.config";import {defineConfig} from "vitest/config";export default defineConfig({resolve:(c as any).resolve,test:{include:["src/runtime/__tests__/pii-swap-live-cerebras.real.test.ts"],exclude:["**/node_modules/**"],testTimeout:90000}})')
```

## Offline coverage (runs in PR CI)

- `packages/core/src/security/pii-pseudonymizer.test.ts` — unit
- `packages/core/src/security/pii-pseudonymizer.fuzz.test.ts` — 3000-iteration
  seeded fuzz: round-trip, no-leak (surrogate-masked), bijection, idempotency,
  determinism, boundary-safety
- `packages/core/src/security/entity-recognizer.test.ts` — recognizers
- `packages/core/src/runtime/__tests__/pii-swap-use-model.test.ts` — ingress
- `packages/core/src/runtime/__tests__/pii-swap-egress.test.ts` — egress
- `plugins/plugin-pii-guard/` — the local distilbert-NER recognizer + its own
  real-model detection test.
